title: Come Play With Us
lesson: Inviting someone who is alone to join in makes everyone happier.
prompts: In a sunny outdoor playground — a slide and swings, a wooden bench, soft grass, warm sunlight — the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image stands on the far left tossing a colourful ball, facing the camera with a happy expression and the face fully visible. On the right, {GENDER_F_AGE_06_RACE_BLACK} catches the ball, laughing. Eye-level medium-wide shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

In a sunny outdoor playground — a slide and swings, a wooden bench, soft grass, warm sunlight — the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image stands on the far left, holding the colourful ball in both hands and pausing, facing the camera with a thoughtful, caring expression and the face fully visible, looking toward the bench. In the background on the right, {GENDER_M_AGE_06_RACE_SOUTH_ASIAN} sits alone on the wooden bench looking sad and left out. Eye-level medium shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

In a sunny outdoor playground — a slide and swings, a wooden bench, soft grass, warm sunlight — the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image walks on the far left toward the wooden bench, facing the camera with a friendly, encouraging smile and the face fully visible, one hand reaching out in welcome. On the right, {GENDER_M_AGE_06_RACE_SOUTH_ASIAN} sits looking up hopefully from the wooden bench. Eye-level medium-wide shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

In a sunny outdoor playground — a slide and swings, a wooden bench, soft grass, warm sunlight — the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image stands on the far left, facing the camera with a kind smile and the face fully visible, holding hands with {GENDER_M_AGE_06_RACE_SOUTH_ASIAN} who stands to the right, now smiling and rising up from the bench. Eye-level medium-wide shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

In a sunny outdoor playground — a slide and swings, a wooden bench, soft grass, warm sunlight — the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image stands on the far left, clapping and laughing as they join the game, facing the camera with a big happy smile and the face fully visible. To the right, {GENDER_F_AGE_06_RACE_BLACK} and {GENDER_M_AGE_06_RACE_SOUTH_ASIAN} play together with a colourful ball, everyone included. Eye-level medium-wide shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

In a sunny outdoor playground — a slide and swings, a wooden bench, soft grass, golden afternoon light — three children stand side by side in a single row, lightly arm in arm, all facing the camera and grinning. From left to right: first the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image on the far left, with a warm, proud smile and the face fully visible; then {GENDER_F_AGE_06_RACE_BLACK}; then {GENDER_M_AGE_06_RACE_SOUTH_ASIAN}. Exactly three children in total, each a single distinct child — no fourth child, no duplicate or extra child, no twin. Eye-level medium-wide shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.
gists: At a sunny playground with a wooden bench, the child (far left) tosses a colourful ball while a girl at right catches it, laughing — the child plays with a friend.
At the playground, the child (far left) pauses holding the ball with a thoughtful, caring look, noticing a boy who sits alone on the bench in the background at right, looking sad and left out.
At the playground, the child (far left) walks toward the bench with a friendly smile and a welcoming reaching hand while the lonely boy at right looks up hopefully — inviting him.
At the playground, the child (far left) holds hands with the boy at right, who now smiles and rises from the bench — he's been invited in.
At the playground, the child (far left) claps and laughs joining the game while the girl and the boy play together with the ball at right — everyone included.

At the playground in golden light, three children stand side by side arm in arm in a row — child far left, then the girl, then the boy — all grinning, exactly three with no duplicates. Including everyone made the best day.
texts: You were at the playground, tossing a ball with your friend. Catch! You both laughed.
Then you saw a boy sitting all alone on a bench. He looked sad and left out.
You walked right over with a friendly smile. "Come play with us!" you said, reaching out your hand.
His face lit up, and he took your hand and stood. Now he had friends to play with!
Everyone played together with the ball. Nobody was left out, and everyone was happy.
You wrapped your arms around your friends with a proud smile. Including everyone made the best day.
